Common.tagline: The commercial platform for Proamina® — the first patented 100% protein sweetener.

Landing.heroTitle: The operating system for the ITALPROTEIN business
Landing.heroSubtitle: One platform to manage companies, NDAs, samples, logistics, technical feedback and the commercial pipeline behind Proamina® — Italprotein's patented 100% protein sweetener.
Landing.platformNote: One connected platform for the Italprotein team and its partners — from first contact to delivered samples and technical feedback.
Landing.internalDesc: For staff: companies, contacts, pipeline, NDAs, samples, logistics, application projects, technical feedback, finance and analytics — role by role.
Landing.externalDesc: For clients, distributors and partners: a private space to view their samples, shipments, documents, projects, feedback and conversations.

features.title: Sample-to-feedback workflow
features.desc: Track every sample from request to shipment, delivery confirmation and technical feedback.

features.title: Track your Proamina® orders
features.desc: Follow every Proamina® order from confirmation to dispatch and delivery, in real time.

features.title: Submit your test results
features.desc: Upload application trials and lab results straight to our R&D team from the portal.

features.title: Create recipes with Proamina®
features.desc: Build, save and share formulations and recipes using Proamina® with our technical experts.

features.title: Proamina® AI assistant
features.desc: Ask anything about Proamina® and get instant answers from the built-in chatbot.

features.title: Role-aware everywhere
features.desc: Navigation and actions adapt to each staff role and each company contact.

Landing.footerNote: Proamina® is a registered trademark. Produced and distributed by Italprotein Srl. For authorised B2B use only.
Landing.radarSubtitle: A complete 360° view of the tools ITALPROTEIN collaborators use every day — from first contact to delivered samples and technical feedback.
Landing.partnersSubtitle: Brands and manufacturers already working with Proamina®.
Landing.ctaBannerTitle: Ready to power the ITALPROTEIN business?
Landing.ctaBannerSubtitle: Get started — register your company, open the portal, or enter the team CRM.

Login.heading: Welcome back
Login.subheading: Enter your company email to access the Proamina® portal.
Login.sideSubtitle: Track samples, orders, documents and test results — and talk to our team — all in one place.
Login.errorNotFound: No account found for this email address. Check the spelling and try again.
Login.errorWrongWorkspace: This address belongs to the Italprotein team. Please use the team login.
Login.futureNote: Access is by invitation. Use the email address registered for you by your Italprotein contact.

TeamLogin.heading: Team sign in
TeamLogin.subheading: Restricted to authorised Italprotein staff. Enter your team email.
TeamLogin.sideSubtitle: Companies, NDAs, samples, logistics and the full commercial pipeline — for the Italprotein team.
TeamLogin.errorNotFound: This email is not on the approved Italprotein team list.
TeamLogin.errorWrongWorkspace: This is a client account. Please use the company portal login.
TeamLogin.altLink: Are you a client? Open the company portal
TeamLogin.futureNote: Access is restricted to authorised Italprotein staff accounts.

ForgotPassword.heading: Reset your password
ForgotPassword.subheadingEmail: Enter your team email — we will send a six-digit code to confirm it's you.
ForgotPassword.subheadingCode: Enter the code we sent to {email} and choose a new password.
ForgotPassword.subheadingDone: All set — your password has been updated.
ForgotPassword.mockModeNote: Password reset is available when the CRM runs against the live backend (api mode).
ForgotPassword.codeSentNotice: If the address belongs to an admin account, a code is on its way.
ForgotPassword.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, with at least one letter and one number.
ForgotPassword.resendCode: Didn't get it? Send a new code
ForgotPassword.doneNotice: Password updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
ForgotPassword.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
ForgotPassword.errorEmailUnavailable: Reset emails are unavailable right now — the Gmail mailbox is not connected. Contact an administrator.
ForgotPassword.errorInvalidCode: That code is not valid. Check the email and try again.
ForgotPassword.errorExpiredCode: This code has expired. Request a new one.
ForgotPassword.errorTooManyAttempts: Too many wrong codes. Request a new one.
ForgotPassword.errorWeakPassword: Password too weak — use at least 10 characters with a letter and a number.
ForgotPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Overview.title: Overview
Overview.subtitle: Your operational snapshot across the Proamina® pipeline.
Overview.buildingNote: Full dashboard widgets, charts and filters arrive in the next build phase.
Overview.reportExportedDescription: Your overview snapshot has been generated.
Overview.companyAcquisitionDescription: New vs cumulative companies over time

Portal.buildingNote: Your full portal dashboard arrives in the next build phase.

ComingSoon.title: {section}
ComingSoon.body: This section is part of the ITALPROTEIN CRM build and will be implemented in an upcoming phase. The navigation, permissions and data model are already in place.

Errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
Errors.permissionBody: Your role does not have access to this section.

AdminAgencies.pageSubtitle: Partner network introducing Proamina® to manufacturers and brands across regions.
AdminAgencies.invitePartnerToastDescription: Partner onboarding link generated and copied to clipboard.
AdminAgencies.myLeadsSubtitle: Companies writing to you — extracted automatically from the Gmail inbox.
AdminAgencies.myLeadsEmpty: No leads yet. When a company emails ad@italprotein.com addressing you ("Dear …") or replying to your mails, its name will appear here.
AdminAgencies.statActiveLeadsHint: {count, plural, one {# active lead in play} other {# active leads in play}}
AdminAgencies.partnersByTypeDescription: Distribution of the partner network by relationship model
AdminAgencies.companiesIntroducedDescription: Top partners by number of companies brought into the pipeline
AdminAgencies.emptyDescription: Agencies and distributors will appear here as they join the network.

AdminAgencyDetail.partnerNotFoundDescription: This agency or distributor does not exist or has been removed.
AdminAgencyDetail.partnerUpdatedToastDescription: Changes have been saved to the partner record.

AdminAgencyDetail.noActivityDescription: No activity has been logged for this partner yet.
AdminAgencyDetail.noNdaDescription: No NDA has been prepared for this partner yet.
AdminAgencyDetail.noTasksDescription: No tasks are linked to this partner yet.

AdminCompanies.toastExportSelectedDescription: Preparing CSV for {count, plural, one {# company} other {# companies}}…
AdminCompanies.createDialogDescription: Create a new company record. It will be prepended to the list.

AdminCompanyDetail.companyNotFoundDescription: This company does not exist or has been removed.

AdminCompanyDetail.engagementMixDescription: Breakdown of records linked to this company.
AdminCompanyDetail.noContactsDescription: Add the people you work with at this company.

AdminContacts.pageSubtitle: Every decision-maker, technical lead and buyer across your accounts.

AdminSamples.toastNoFurtherStageDescription: {reference} is already at the final stage.

AdminAnalytics.companiesOverTimeDescription: New accounts added each month and cumulative growth.

AdminAnalytics.mostCommonApplicationsDescription: Leading product applications across sample requests.
AdminAnalytics.teamActivityDescription: Logged activities, open tasks and assigned accounts per team member.

AdminAudit.subtitle: A record of system and data events. Production logs are written server-side.

AdminCommunications.title: Communications
AdminCommunications.subtitle: Client requests, conversations and the outbound email log.
AdminCommunications.selectRequestDescription: Choose a thread to view the conversation.
AdminCommunications.composeDescription: Sent from {email} via the connected Gmail account.
AdminCommunications.composeDescriptionNoAccount: Connect the Gmail mailbox in Settings to send real emails.
AdminCommunications.emailSentDescription: Your message was sent from the Italprotein mailbox.
AdminCommunications.errorGmailNotConnected: The Gmail mailbox is not connected. Connect it in Settings → Integrations.
AdminCommunications.errorRateLimited: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.
AdminCommunications.errorInvalidRecipients: One or more recipient addresses are not valid.
AdminCommunications.errorInvalidContent: Subject or message is empty or too long.
AdminCommunications.errorSendFailed: Gmail could not send the message. Try again.
AdminCommunications.gmailNotConnected: Gmail is not connected, so the inbox cannot be synced.
AdminCommunications.syncDoneDescription: {created} new messages · {ndas} NDAs filed · {leads} leads updated.
AdminCommunications.inboxEmptyDescription: Sync the mailbox to pull in received messages.

AdminFeedback.pageSubtitle: Sensory and application test feedback from clients — triage, reply and close the loop.
AdminFeedback.emptyDescription: Adjust the filters to see more results.
AdminFeedback.toastTechnicalCallScheduledDescription: A technical call has been flagged for {reference}.
AdminFeedback.noCommentsYet: No comments yet. Start the conversation below.

AdminFinance.pageSubtitle: Track every quotation, order and invoice from issue to settlement.
AdminFinance.emptyDescription: Adjust the filters or create a new quote.
AdminFinance.dialogDescription: Draft a quotation for a company. Totals compute automatically.

AdminImportExport.title: Import / Export
AdminImportExport.subtitle: Bring data in from CSV or export any dataset for analysis.
AdminImportExport.entityToImportHelp: Choose which dataset the uploaded CSV maps to.
AdminImportExport.dragDropHelp: or click to browse (preview — no file is uploaded)
AdminImportExport.mapPreview: Preview of detected columns mapped to {entity} fields.
AdminImportExport.exportHelp: Download any dataset as CSV for spreadsheets or BI tools.

AdminNdas.pageSubtitle: Prepare, track and file confidentiality agreements across every relationship.

AdminNdas.toastFollowUpCreatedDescription: Reminder to chase {reference} added to your tasks.
AdminNdas.createDialogDescription: Draft a confidentiality agreement and track it through signing.
AdminNdas.preparationNotePlaceholder: Template used, special clauses, affiliates covered…
AdminNdas.uploadDialogDescription: File an existing agreement document against a company record.
AdminNdas.uploadDragDropHint: Drag-and-drop is simulated in this prototype — enter the file name to file it.
AdminNdas.noteDialogDescription: Append a note to {reference}'s version history.
AdminNdas.notePlaceholder: Add context — a call summary, legal observation, reminder…
AdminNdas.revisionDialogDescription: Flag changes required on {reference} and notify the counterparty.
AdminNdas.revisionPlaceholder: Describe the clauses or terms that need to change…

AdminNotifications.subtitle: Everything that needs your attention across the pipeline.

AdminProducts.emptyDescription: Adjust filters or add a new product.

AdminProjects.chartStageDescription: Where co-development work sits in the lifecycle
AdminProjects.emptyDescription: Adjust the filters to see more application projects.

AdminRegistrations.emptyDescription: No business registrations match this filter.
AdminRegistrations.rejectDialogDescription: This will reject {reference} — {company}. The applicant will be notified.
AdminRegistrations.infoDialogDescription: A message will be sent to {email}. The registration moves to “More info requested”.
AdminRegistrations.infoMessagePlaceholder: Please confirm your VAT number and intended order volumes…
AdminRegistrations.toastCompanyCreatedDescription: {company} is now an active company account.

AdminSampleDetail.notFoundDescription: This sample request does not exist or was removed.
AdminSampleDetail.shipmentCreatedDescription: A draft shipment for {reference} is ready for dispatch.
AdminSampleDetail.noDocumentsRequired: No documents required for this sample.
AdminSampleDetail.rejectDialogDescription: This will mark {reference} as rejected. The requester will be notified.

AdminSettings.title: Settings
AdminSettings.subtitle: Configure your ITALPROTEIN CRM workspace.
AdminSettings.emailTriggersDescription: Choose which events send a notification email.
AdminSettings.themeHint: Light / dark theme can be toggled any time from the sun/moon button in the top bar.
AdminSettings.localDataDescription: In local preview mode the app runs on seeded sample data with a browser-local overlay for your edits. Resetting clears that overlay and signs you out.
AdminSettings.resetDialogDescription: This clears every local edit (companies, samples, NDAs, tasks…) and restores the seeded sample dataset. You will be signed out.
AdminSettings.securityDescription: Update the password you use to sign in to the CRM.
AdminSettings.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, with at least one letter and one number.
AdminSettings.passwordChangedDescription: Use the new password the next time you sign in.
AdminSettings.passwordErrorInvalidCurrent: The current password is not correct.
AdminSettings.passwordErrorWeak: New password too weak — use at least 10 characters with a letter and a number.
AdminSettings.passwordErrorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
AdminSettings.passwordErrorMismatch: The two new passwords don't match.
AdminSettings.passwordErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
AdminSettings.gmailDescription: Connect the ad@italprotein.com mailbox so the CRM can read received messages, auto-file NDAs, build My Leads and send email on your behalf.
AdminSettings.gmailNotConnectedHint: No mailbox connected yet. Sign in with the Google account for ad@italprotein.com to enable inbox sync and sending.
AdminSettings.gmailExpired: The connection for {email} is expired or revoked — reconnect to resume syncing.
AdminSettings.gmailConnectedToastDescription: The mailbox is linked — the inbox will sync into Communications.
AdminSettings.gmailErrorToastDescription: The Google authorisation didn't complete. Please try again.
AdminSettings.gmailNotConfiguredToast: Google OAuth credentials are missing — set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET and GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI first.
AdminSettings.gmailSyncFailed: Sync failed — check the connection and try again.

AdminTasks.pageSubtitle: Plan and track every follow-up across the commercial pipeline.
AdminTasks.emptyDescription: Adjust the filter or create a new task.
AdminTasks.dialogDescription: Create a follow-up and assign a due date.
AdminTasks.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Follow up on sample feedback

AdminUsers.title: Users & Roles
AdminUsers.subtitle: Italprotein staff directory, roles and access overview.
AdminUsers.permissionOverviewDescription: What each role can access. Authorization shown here is client-side only — production enforces these rules server-side.

Amina.name: Amina
Amina.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
Amina.welcomeBody: I can help with Proamina® samples, shipments, documents and projects. I only answer within what your account is allowed to see.
Amina.example1: Where is our latest sample shipment?
Amina.example2: Which Proamina® documents are available to us?
Amina.example3: What does our NDA status mean?
Amina.previewBadge: Preview — not connected to the model yet
Amina.errorRateLimited: Too many messages. Please wait a moment and try again.
